headline: Are Gold.com's Strategic Acquisitions Powering Long-Term Growth?
summary: GOLD's acquisition spree-from Monex to Atkinsons-scales its DTC platform, boosts global reach and drives synergies, but valuation looks stretched.

headline: 2 Internet Stocks to Target This Week and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Whether it be online shopping or social media, secular forces are propelling consumer internet businesses forward. But it’s not all sunshine and rainbows as consumer purchasing power can make or break demand. Unfortunately, the market seems to believe stormy skies are ahead as the industry has shed 31.5% over the past six months. This drawdown is a stark contrast from the S&P 500’s 1.1% gain.

headline: A Look At Robinhood Markets (HOOD) Valuation As It Expands Into A Broader Financial Super App
summary: Recent product launches at Robinhood Markets (HOOD), including a high fee platinum credit card, tokenized stock access in Europe, and early social trading tools, have pushed investors to reassess what the company is building. See our latest analysis for Robinhood Markets. Despite a series of product launches, Robinhood’s recent share price performance has cooled, with a 1-day share price return decline of 3.17% and a 90-day share price return decline of 36.07%, while the 1-year total...
